since_last: 33% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.46%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -0.71% · Gold +1.27% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 33% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.46%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.46%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +20.52%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +20.52%, DELL +8.78%, CRNC +6.50%, NRG +4.90%, CEG +4.34%. Laggards: PATH -11.67%, GEV -7.19%, SPCX -6.10%, PLTR -5.74%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.10% at $116.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
